recommendations.title: Memoir of a Snail
recommendations.overview: Forcibly separated from her twin brother when they are orphaned, a melancholic misfit learns how to find confidence within herself amid the clutter of misfortunes and everyday life.

recommendations.title: All That Divides Us
recommendations.overview: A middle-class house in the middle of nowhere. A council estate in Sète. A mother and daughter. Two childhood friends. A vanishing. Blackmail. A clash between two worlds.

recommendations.title: Father Mother Sister Brother
recommendations.overview: Estranged siblings reunite after years apart, forced to confront unresolved tensions and reevaluate their strained relationships with their emotionally distant parents.

recommendations.title: Sexual Chronicles of a French Family
recommendations.overview: Three generations of a French family open up about their sexual experiences and desires after young Romain is caught masturbating in his biology class.

recommendations.title: Corpo Celeste
recommendations.overview: After growing up in Switzerland, 13-year-old Marta returns to a city in southern Italy with her mother and older sister. Independent and inquisitive, she joins a catechism class at a local church. However, the games and religious pop songs she encoun

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity
recommendations.overview: After a young, middle-class couple moves into what seems like a typical suburban house, they become increasingly disturbed by a presence that may or may not be demonic but is certainly the most active in the middle of the night.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: An early-20th-century tale of love across class boundaries which tells the legendary and romantic story of Lady Chatterley’s affair with her gamekeeper. Jed Mercurio’s adaptation of DH Lawrence’s classic.

recommendations.title: Mamma Roma
recommendations.overview: After years spent working as a prostitute in her Italian village, middle-aged Mamma Roma has saved enough money to buy herself a fruit stand so that she can have a respectable middle-class life and reestablish contact with the 16-year-old son she aba

recommendations.title: Hold Your Breath
recommendations.overview: In 1930s Oklahoma amid the region's horrific dust storms, a woman is convinced that a sinister presence is threatening her family.

recommendations.title: Les Misérables
